storyBeat: 老爺爺種大蘿蔔 — 長得越來越大

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
本節新單字 (左中右英):
🔑 grandpa = 爺爺
🔑 seed = 種子
🔑 water = 水
🔑 grow = 長大
背熟這 4 個字,故事就會輕鬆聽懂。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Grandpa plants a small turnip seed in his garden.
questions.explanationZh: 爺爺在園子裡蹲下身子,把一顆小小的蘿蔔種子輕輕埋進土裡。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Every morning, he gives the seed water.
questions.explanationZh: 每天清晨,爺爺都會來澆水。一天都沒有少過。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Grandpa sings to the seed every day. He never forgets.
questions.questionEn: Does Grandpa care about this turnip?
questions.explanationZh: 每天唱歌、從來不忘——這樣的爺爺,怎麼可能不在乎呢?答案是 Yes 囉!
questions.sentenceZh: 爺爺每天對著種子唱歌,從來不忘記。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: A green leaf comes up. Then more leaves come up.
questions.explanationZh: 一片綠葉冒出來。然後更多葉子冒出來。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Week by week, the turnip gets larger than the others.
questions.question: How is the turnip growing?
questions.explanationZh: 「一週又一週」、「比其他的大」,兩個線索疊起來,答案就是:越來越大。
questions.sentenceZh: 一週又一週,蘿蔔長得比其他的都大。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The turnip pushes up the dirt. The top is round and yellow.
questions.explanationZh: 蘿蔔把土頂起來。頂上圓圓黃黃的。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: How big is the turnip now?
questions.question: How big?
questions.explanationZh: 前幾句說它比別的都大——那當然是「非常大」囉!
questions.sentenceZh: 現在的蘿蔔有多大?

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Grandpa cannot put his arms all the way around the top.
questions.question: Why is the turnip a problem?
questions.explanationZh: 手抱不過去,代表它大得不得了——所以問題在於「太大抱不住」。
questions.sentenceZh: 爺爺的雙手抱不住蘿蔔頂端。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: A tiny seed has grown into the biggest turnip in the village.
questions.question: What is this scene mainly showing?
options: a small flower in the garden bed
a busy market day in the village
questions.explanationZh: 這一幕在說什麼?就是一顆小種子竟然長到超出一般大小,比全村的蘿蔔都大!
questions.sentenceZh: 一顆小種子,長成了全村最大的蘿蔔。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: It is the biggest turnip in the village. Grandpa looks at it. "Time to pull it out..."
questions.explanationZh: 這是全村最大的蘿蔔。爺爺看著它,輕聲說:「該把它拔出來了……」

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Grandpa plants a small turnip seed and waters it each day.
questions.question: What two actions help the seed grow?
options: digging it up twice a week
questions.explanationZh: 爺爺每天種下去、每天澆水——這就是「caring for it every day」!
questions.sentenceZh: 爺爺種下一顆小蘿蔔種子,每天都澆水。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The turnip grew and grew until it was the biggest in the village.
questions.questionEn: Did the turnip stay small after Grandpa watered it?
questions.explanationZh: 「grew and grew」是越長越大——哪裡是待著不動?答案是 No,它長大了。
questions.sentenceZh: 蘿蔔越長越大,直到成了村裡最大的。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: A green leaf came up first, then more leaves followed one by one.
questions.question: What appeared from the ground before anything else?
questions.explanationZh: 「A green leaf came up first」就是說葉子最先出來!
questions.sentenceZh: 先長出一片綠葉,然後更多葉子一片一片地跟著出來。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match the words from this lesson.
questions.explanationZh:
🔑 leaf = 葉子
🔑 dirt = 土
🔑 big = 大
🔑 round = 圓
這 4 個字在故事裡都出現了,配對一下吧!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Grandpa sang to the seed every day and never forgot.
questions.question: Why does Grandpa sing to the seed?
questions.explanationZh: 每天唱歌又從不忘記——這就是真心「喜歡照顧它」的表現喔!
questions.sentenceZh: 爺爺每天對著種子唱歌,從來不忘記。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Every morning, he ___ the seed water.
questions.question: Choose the correct word.
questions.explanationZh: 「he」是第三人稱單數,現在式動詞要加 -s → gives。奶奶說:he gives 才對喔!
questions.sentenceZh: 每天早上,他給種子澆水。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: What colour is the top of the turnip?
questions.question: What colour?
questions.explanationZh: 「The top is round and yellow」——頂端是黃色的喔!
questions.sentenceZh: 蘿蔔頂端是什麼顏色?

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Grandpa cannot put his arms all the way around the top.
questions.questionEn: Is the turnip easy for one person to carry?
questions.explanationZh: 手抱不過去——哪有可能容易拿呢?答案是 No,太大了!
questions.sentenceZh: 爺爺的雙手抱不住蘿蔔的頂端。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
本節新單字 (左中右英):
🔑 pull = 拉
🔑 leaves = 葉子
🔑 hands = 手
🔑 move = 動
背熟這 4 個字,故事就會輕鬆聽懂。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Grandpa walks into the garden. He puts down his hat.
questions.explanationZh: 爺爺走進園子,把帽子輕輕放在一邊——要認真工作了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He holds the green leaves with both hands.
questions.explanationZh: 爺爺用兩隻手緊緊抓住葉子,準備用力拉。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Grandpa pulls hard. He pulls again. His face turns red.
questions.questionEn: Is Grandpa using a lot of strength?
questions.explanationZh: 一拉再拉,臉都紅了——這不是費盡全力是什麼呀?答案是 Yes!
questions.sentenceZh: 爺爺用力拉,又拉了一次。他的臉變得紅紅的。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The turnip stays right where it is. Not one bit out of the dirt.
questions.question: What happens to the turnip?
questions.explanationZh: 「一點都沒從土裡出來」——也就是完全沒動嘛!
questions.sentenceZh: 蘿蔔就待在原地,一點都沒從土裡出來。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Grandpa sits down on the dirt. He looks at his hands.
questions.explanationZh: 爺爺累了,坐到土上。他看著自己的手,心裡大概很不是滋味。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: How does Grandpa feel right now?
questions.question: How does he feel?
questions.explanationZh: 拉不動坐下來,那當然是「又累又卡住」啦!
questions.sentenceZh: 爺爺現在覺得怎麼樣?

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He pulls one more time. His hands slip off the leaves.
questions.explanationZh: 他再試了一次——結果手從葉子上滑開了,更挫折了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: One person's hands are too few. The turnip is much too big.
questions.question: Why can't Grandpa pull it out?
options: the dirt is too wet today
questions.explanationZh: 「一個人手太少」加上「蘿蔔太大」,加在一起的意思就是:一個人不夠啦!
questions.sentenceZh: 一個人的手太少了。蘿蔔實在太大。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Grandpa looks back at the house. Someone else lives with him.
questions.question: What is Grandpa thinking now?
questions.explanationZh: 回頭看屋子,屋裡還有別人——這是在想什麼?當然是想叫人來幫忙囉!
questions.sentenceZh: 爺爺回頭看了一眼屋子。屋裡還有別人住著呢。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Grandpa stands up. "I cannot do this alone," he says. "I need help..."
questions.explanationZh: 爺爺站起身,說:「我一個人做不到,我需要幫忙……」

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Grandpa holds the green leaves and pulls with all his strength.
questions.question: What does Grandpa grab to pull the turnip?
questions.explanationZh: 「holds the green leaves」——爺爺抓的就是綠葉子,用力往上拉!
questions.sentenceZh: 爺爺抓住綠葉子,用全力拉。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He pulls again and again but the turnip does not move at all.
questions.questionEn: Did Grandpa give up after the first try?
questions.explanationZh: 「again and again」——一再一再地拉,沒有放棄。答案是 No,他繼續試!
questions.sentenceZh: 他一拉再拉,但蘿蔔一點都沒動。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He pulls one more time. His hands slip off the leaves.
questions.question: What happens to his hands?
questions.explanationZh: 「hands slip off」——手從葉子上滑掉了!試了那麼多次手都麻了。
questions.sentenceZh: 他再拉了一次,手從葉子上滑掉了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match the words from this lesson.
questions.explanationZh:
🔑 pull = 拉
🔑 strength = 用力
🔑 face = 臉
🔑 ground = 地
這 4 個字幫你記住這節的重點!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Grandpa sat on the dirt, wiping sweat from his forehead.
questions.question: Which emoji best shows how Grandpa feels?
questions.explanationZh: 擦汗、坐在地上——爺爺累壞了,「worn out」最貼切。
questions.sentenceZh: 爺爺坐在地上,用手擦去額頭上的汗水。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: One person's hands are too few. The turnip is much too big.
questions.question: What does Grandpa understand now?
questions.explanationZh: 「hands are too few」——手不夠——所以明白「需要更多手(幫忙的人)」!
questions.sentenceZh: 一個人的手太少了。蘿蔔實在太大。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Grandpa ___ down on the dirt after pulling so hard.
questions.question: Choose the correct word.
questions.explanationZh: 這句在描述故事裡「已經發生的事」,所以用過去式 sat(sit 的過去式)。奶奶說故事都用過去式喔!
questions.sentenceZh: 爺爺拉得那麼用力之後坐到土上。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Grandpa looks back at the house and thinks about asking for help.
questions.questionEn: Is Grandpa ready to ask someone for help?
questions.explanationZh: 回頭看屋子、想著幫忙——這正是他在考慮「找人幫忙」的樣子。答案是 Yes!
questions.sentenceZh: 爺爺回頭看了一眼屋子,心裡想著要請人幫忙。

storyBeat: 叫奶奶來幫 — 還是拔不動

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
本節新單字 (左中右英):
🔑 grandma = 奶奶
🔑 call = 叫
🔑 help = 幫忙
🔑 both = 兩個
背熟這 4 個字,故事就會輕鬆聽懂。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Grandpa calls toward the kitchen. "Grandma, come help me!"
questions.explanationZh: 爺爺轉向廚房大叫:「奶奶,快來幫我!」

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Grandma comes out, drying her hands on her apron.
questions.explanationZh: 奶奶從廚房走出來,一邊用圍裙擦手——她剛才還在忙呢。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She walks fast. She does not ask any questions first.
questions.questionEn: Does Grandma want to help right away?
questions.explanationZh: 走得快、連問都不問就衝出來——這樣的奶奶,當然是馬上想幫忙啦!答案是 Yes。
questions.sentenceZh: 她走得很快,一個問題都沒問就來了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Grandma holds the back of Grandpa's coat with her two hands.
questions.question: Where does Grandma hold on?
options: on the man in front of her
questions.explanationZh: 抓爺爺外套後面,也就是抓住前面那個人,然後一起拉!
questions.sentenceZh: 奶奶用兩隻手抓住爺爺外套的後面。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Grandpa pulls the turnip. Grandma pulls Grandpa.
questions.explanationZh: 爺爺拉蘿蔔。奶奶拉爺爺。一前一後,串成一條線!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: How many people are pulling now?
questions.question: How many?
questions.explanationZh: 爺爺加奶奶——一加一等於兩個人!
questions.sentenceZh: 現在有幾個人在拉?

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: They both pull. They count out loud. One, two, pull!
questions.explanationZh: 兩個人一起拉,還一邊數:一、二——拉!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Even with two pulling together, the turnip stays in the dirt.
questions.question: What happens with two pullers?
questions.explanationZh: 兩個人一起拉了,蘿蔔還是沒出來——也就是說,還是卡著。
questions.sentenceZh: 就算兩個人一起拉,蘿蔔還是待在土裡不動。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: One person tried and could not. Two together tried and still cannot.
questions.question: What is this scene mainly showing?
options: Grandma is too small to help at all
help is needed but two is not enough
Grandpa is angry and stops trying
optionsZh: 需要幫忙 + 兩個不夠
questions.explanationZh: 一個不行、兩個還是不行——這一幕在說:需要更多幫手,兩個人不夠!
questions.sentenceZh: 一個人試過沒辦法。兩個人一起試還是沒辦法。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Two is not enough. Grandma looks at Grandpa. "Who else can we ask?"
questions.explanationZh: 兩個還不夠。奶奶看著爺爺:「我們還能叫誰?」

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Grandpa called Grandma and she came out drying her hands.
questions.question: What was Grandma doing just before she came out?
questions.explanationZh: 「drying her hands」——擦著手出來,說明她剛剛在裡面做事(洗碗/煮菜)。
questions.sentenceZh: 爺爺叫了奶奶,她擦著手走出來。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She walks fast and does not ask any questions first.
questions.questionEn: Did Grandma stop to ask what was happening before running out?
questions.explanationZh: 「does not ask any questions」——一個問題都沒問就衝出去。答案是 No,她直接幫忙!
questions.sentenceZh: 她走得很快,一個問題都沒問。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match the words from this lesson.
questions.explanationZh:
🔑 coat = 外套
🔑 count = 數
🔑 together = 一起
🔑 call = 喊
這 4 個字在這節故事裡都很重要!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Grandpa pulls the turnip. Grandma pulls Grandpa.
questions.question: Who holds the back of Grandpa's coat?
questions.explanationZh: 奶奶抓爺爺外套後面——所以是「Grandma does」,很簡單喔!
questions.sentenceZh: 爺爺拉蘿蔔,奶奶拉爺爺。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Two people pull together but the turnip still does not come out.
questions.question: How do they feel after that?
questions.explanationZh: 兩個人一起拉了,還是出不來——一定是「驚訝又難過」的心情呀!
questions.sentenceZh: 兩個人一起拉,蘿蔔還是沒出來。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: They both pull. They count out loud. One, two, pull!
questions.question: Why do they count out loud together?
options: to teach the turnip some words
so both pull at the exact moment
so the neighbours can watch them
questions.explanationZh: 一起數「One, two, pull!」就是要同時出力!
questions.sentenceZh: 他們一起拉。他們大聲數數。一、二、拉!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Two is not enough. Grandma looks at Grandpa and asks who else can help.
questions.questionEn: Are Grandpa and Grandma going to stop trying now?
questions.explanationZh: 「who else can help?」——在問還有誰可以幫,說明他們不放棄,要繼續找幫手。答案是 No!
questions.sentenceZh: 兩個不夠。奶奶問爺爺:我們還能叫誰?

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: One person tried and could not. Two together tried and still cannot.
questions.question: What is the pattern in this story?
options: rain falls every time they pull
they give up after every turn
the turnip gets smaller each try
each time one more joins to try
questions.explanationZh: 一個→兩個→還是不行……這就是「每次多一個人加入」的規律!這個故事就是這樣的結構。
questions.sentenceZh: 一個不行,兩個一起還是不行。

storyBeat: 叫孫女來幫 — 越來越多人

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
本節新單字 (左中右英):
🔑 granddaughter = 孫女
🔑 run = 跑
🔑 apron = 圍裙
🔑 together = 一起
背熟這 4 個字,故事就會輕鬆聽懂。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Grandma calls toward the house. "Granddaughter, come help us!"
questions.explanationZh: 奶奶對著屋子大叫:「孫女,快來幫我們!」

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: A little girl runs out of the door. She is fast.
questions.explanationZh: 一個小女孩從門裡衝出來,跑得飛快。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She does not even put her shoes on. She runs to the garden.
questions.questionEn: Is the granddaughter excited to help?
questions.explanationZh: 連鞋都沒穿就衝出去——這不是急著想幫忙是什麼?答案是 Yes!
questions.sentenceZh: 她連鞋子都沒穿就跑去園子了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The little girl grabs the back of Grandma's apron with both hands.
questions.question: What does Granddaughter hold on to?
options: the lady in front of her
questions.explanationZh: 抓的是奶奶的圍裙,也就是前面那位女士的衣服囉!
questions.sentenceZh: 小女孩用兩隻手抓住奶奶圍裙的後面。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Grandpa pulls. Grandma pulls. Granddaughter pulls.
questions.explanationZh: 爺爺拉。奶奶拉。孫女拉。一個接著一個!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: How many people are pulling now?
questions.question: How many?
questions.explanationZh: 爺爺加奶奶加孫女——一加一加一等於三個人!
questions.sentenceZh: 現在有幾個人在拉?

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Three of them pull at the same time. They count again.
questions.explanationZh: 三個人同時用力,嘴裡還一起數著。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Three pairs of hands. Three sets of feet pushing in the dirt.
questions.question: What are they all doing together?
questions.explanationZh: 三雙手三雙腳全部一起使力——當然是當一隊一起拉啦!
questions.sentenceZh: 三雙手。三雙腳踩在土上用力。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: They pull and pull. The turnip will not move.
questions.question: Why does the turnip still not move?
questions.explanationZh: 三個人全力拉了,蘿蔔還是沒動——代表三個還是不夠!
questions.sentenceZh: 他們一直拉,蘿蔔就是不動。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Three is not enough either. Granddaughter looks around. "We need more help!"
questions.explanationZh: 三個還是不夠。孫女四處望:「我們還需要更多人!」

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The little girl runs out of the door without putting shoes on.
questions.question: Why did she run without her shoes?
options: she lost her shoes long ago
questions.explanationZh: 連鞋都顧不上穿——就是「太興奮等不及」啦!這個小女孩真的很熱心。
questions.sentenceZh: 小女孩沒穿鞋就衝出門。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The little girl grabs the back of Grandma's apron with both hands.
questions.questionEn: Does each helper hold the person just in front of them?
questions.explanationZh: 孫女抓奶奶、奶奶抓爺爺、爺爺抓蘿蔔——是的,每個人抓前面那個人。答案是 Yes!
questions.sentenceZh: 小女孩用兩隻手抓住奶奶圍裙的後面。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match the words from this lesson.
questions.explanationZh:
🔑 run = 跑
🔑 door = 門
🔑 apron = 圍裙
🔑 granddaughter = 孫女
這節新單字,配對一下吧!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Grandpa pulls. Grandma pulls. Granddaughter pulls.
questions.question: How many people are in the pulling line now?
questions.explanationZh: 爺爺+奶奶+孫女 = 三個人!好整齊的一條線。
questions.sentenceZh: 爺爺拉,奶奶拉,孫女也拉。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Three people pull together with all their strength.
questions.question: What do they feel while pulling?
questions.explanationZh: 三個人齊心拉——當然是「有力又有希望」的感覺!大家都相信這次可以!
questions.sentenceZh: 三個人一起用全力拉。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: They pull and pull. The turnip will not move.
questions.question: What does the family understand after three people fail?
questions.explanationZh: 三個都不行了——那只有一個可能:「還需要更多幫忙」!
questions.sentenceZh: 他們一直拉,蘿蔔還是不動。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Three is not enough either. Granddaughter looks around for more help.
questions.questionEn: Has the family given up on pulling the turnip?
questions.explanationZh: 孫女四處找更多幫手——沒有放棄,繼續找!答案是 No。
questions.sentenceZh: 三個還是不夠,孫女四處張望,找更多幫手。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Each new person joins at the back of the line and holds the one in front.
questions.question: Where does each new helper stand?
options: at the end of the line
at the front near the turnip
questions.explanationZh: 每個新幫手都接在最後面——這就是這個故事的規律:「在隊伍最後面」!
questions.sentenceZh: 每個新加入的人站在隊伍最後面,抓住前面的人。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
本節新單字 (左中右英):
🔑 dog = 狗
🔑 over = 過來
🔑 teeth = 牙齒
🔑 four = 四個
背熟這 4 個字,故事就會輕鬆聽懂。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Granddaughter calls toward the yard. "Little dog, come help us!"
questions.explanationZh: 孫女對著院子叫:「小狗,快來幫我們!」

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The little dog runs over. His tail moves fast.
questions.explanationZh: 小狗聽到叫聲,立刻跑了過來,尾巴搖個不停。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The dog wags his tail. He looks up at the girl.
questions.questionEn: Is the dog ready to help?
questions.explanationZh: 搖尾巴、抬頭看——這就是小狗說「我準備好了!」的方式。答案是 Yes!
questions.sentenceZh: 小狗搖著尾巴,抬頭看著小女孩。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The dog uses his teeth to hold the back of Granddaughter's dress.
questions.question: How does the dog hold on?
questions.explanationZh: 用牙齒咬住——也就是嘴巴咬住衣服,加入拉的隊伍!
questions.sentenceZh: 小狗用牙齒咬住孫女衣服的後面。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Grandpa pulls. Grandma pulls. Granddaughter pulls. Dog pulls.
questions.explanationZh: 爺爺拉。奶奶拉。孫女拉。狗也拉。隊伍越來越長了!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: How many are pulling now?
questions.question: How many?
questions.explanationZh: 爺爺加奶奶加孫女加狗——數一數,四個!
questions.sentenceZh: 現在有幾個在拉?

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Four of them pull. They count together. One, two, three, pull!
questions.explanationZh: 四個一起數:一、二、三——拉!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Even with the dog's teeth pulling too, the turnip stays put.
questions.question: What happens with the dog helping?
questions.explanationZh: 狗加進來了,蘿蔔卻還是沒動——也就是,還是沒動。
questions.sentenceZh: 就算小狗的牙齒也一起拉,蘿蔔還是沒動。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: A dog joins the family. Even four pulling, the turnip stays.
questions.question: What is this scene mainly showing?
options: more help joins but it is still not enough
the dog wins a running race in the field
the family sits down to eat a big dinner
a clever dog learns a brand new trick
optionsZh: 又多了幫手但還是不夠
狗在田裡贏了一場賽跑
全家坐下來吃一頓大餐
聰明的狗學會一個全新的把戲
questions.explanationZh: 四個幫手齊力拉,蘿蔔依舊紋絲不動——這一幕的重點是:幫手越來越多,但還是不夠!
questions.sentenceZh: 家裡的狗加入了。就算四個一起拉,蘿蔔還是沒動。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Four is not enough. The dog barks once. "Maybe my friend the cat can come..."
questions.explanationZh: 四個還是不夠。小狗叫了一聲:「也許我的好朋友貓咪可以來……」

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The little dog runs over. His tail moves fast.
questions.question: What does a fast-moving tail usually tell us about a dog?
questions.explanationZh: 尾巴搖快 = 高興!「joy and eagerness」最貼切。
questions.sentenceZh: 小狗跑過來,牠的尾巴搖得好快。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The dog uses his teeth to hold the back of Granddaughter's dress.
questions.questionEn: Does the dog grab onto the turnip directly?
questions.explanationZh: 小狗咬的是孫女的衣服,不是蘿蔔——所以答案是 No,他抓的是前面的人!
questions.sentenceZh: 小狗用牙齒咬住孫女衣服的後面。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match the words from this lesson.
questions.explanationZh:
🔑 dog = 狗
🔑 teeth = 牙齒
🔑 tail = 尾巴
🔑 dress = 衣服
這節小狗登場的單字!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Four of them pull. They count together. One, two, three, pull!
questions.question: Who is pulling this time?
options: the dog and the cat alone
Grandpa, Grandma, the girl, the dog
questions.explanationZh: 爺爺+奶奶+孫女+狗=四個!「Grandpa, Grandma, the girl, the dog」全部都有。
questions.sentenceZh: 四個一起拉,大聲數:一、二、三——拉!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Even with the dog's teeth pulling, the turnip stays in the ground.
questions.question: Which emoji best shows what the turnip does?
questions.explanationZh: 「stays in the ground」= 紋絲不動——選「🪨 stays put」!
questions.sentenceZh: 即使小狗咬住用力拉,蘿蔔還是留在地裡。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The dog barks once. Maybe his friend the cat can help.
questions.question: Why does the dog think of the cat?
options: he is bored of the dog
questions.explanationZh: 四個還是不夠——所以「他要多一個幫手」!小狗想到了朋友貓咪。
questions.sentenceZh: 小狗叫了一聲。也許他朋友貓咪可以來幫忙。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Four is not enough. The dog barks once and looks toward the wall.
questions.questionEn: Is the dog asking someone new for help?
questions.explanationZh: 叫一聲、望向牆邊——當然是在叫新幫手貓咪。答案是 Yes!
questions.sentenceZh: 四個不夠。小狗叫了一聲,看向牆那邊。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: A dog joins the family. Even four pulling, the turnip stays.
questions.question: What lesson is this scene building up to?
questions.explanationZh: 一個又一個加進來——故事在告訴我們「每個幫手都很重要」,缺一不可!
questions.sentenceZh: 小狗加入了。就算四個一起拉,蘿蔔還是沒動。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
本節新單字 (左中右英):
🔑 cat = 貓
🔑 walk = 走
🔑 tail = 尾巴
🔑 enough = 足夠
背熟這 4 個字,故事就會輕鬆聽懂。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The dog calls toward the wall. "Cat, come help us!"
questions.explanationZh: 小狗對著牆那邊叫:「貓咪,快來幫我們!」

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The cat walks over slowly. She takes her time.
questions.explanationZh: 貓咪慢慢地踱過來。她不急——貓咪本來就這樣嘛。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The cat does not run. She stops to look at the turnip first.
questions.questionEn: Does the cat care about being fast?
questions.explanationZh: 慢慢走、還先看一看——貓咪根本不在乎快不快。答案是 No。
questions.sentenceZh: 貓咪沒有跑。她先停下來看了看蘿蔔。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The cat holds the dog's tail gently between her front paws.
questions.question: How does the cat hold on?
options: with her teeth on a leaf
with paws on the dog's tail
questions.explanationZh: 用前腳抱住狗的尾巴——加入隊伍的方式真有貓咪風格!
questions.sentenceZh: 貓咪用前腳輕輕地抱住狗的尾巴。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Five of them pull now. Everyone pulls as hard as they can.
questions.explanationZh: 現在五個人一起拉了。每個都使出全力。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: How many are pulling now?
questions.question: How many?
questions.explanationZh: 爺爺加奶奶加孫女加狗加貓——五個!
questions.sentenceZh: 現在有幾個在拉?

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: They count again. One, two, three, pull!
questions.explanationZh: 大家又數一次:一、二、三——拉!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The turnip moves a tiny bit. The top wobbles in the dirt.
questions.question: What is different this time?
options: a new green leaf grows out
questions.explanationZh: 這次不一樣了——蘿蔔動了一點點!雖然還沒出來,但有進展喔。
questions.sentenceZh: 蘿蔔動了一點點。頂端在土裡搖了一下。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: But after that tiny move, the turnip stops. It is still stuck.
questions.question: Why did the turnip move only a little?
options: the cat is too small to help
almost enough, but one more is needed
the dirt around it is much too soft
they are pulling the wrong way
questions.explanationZh: 動了一下又停——就差那麼一點,還需要再多一個幫手!
questions.sentenceZh: 但動了那麼一點之後,蘿蔔又停了。還是卡著。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: It moved! But not enough. The cat looks at her little friend by the wall...
questions.explanationZh: 動了!但還不夠。貓咪看向牆邊的那位小朋友……

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The cat walks over slowly. She takes her time.
questions.question: How does the cat arrive?
questions.explanationZh: 「walks slowly + takes her time」——慢慢走、不急不忙,就是「慢慢悠悠」的貓咪風格!
questions.sentenceZh: 貓咪慢慢踱過來,她不慌不忙。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The cat stops to look at the turnip first before joining the line.
questions.questionEn: Does the cat rush straight to help without looking?
questions.explanationZh: 她先停下來看一看——沒有直衝過去。答案是 No,貓咪有自己的節奏!
questions.sentenceZh: 貓咪先停下來看了看蘿蔔,才加入隊伍。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match the words from this lesson.
questions.explanationZh:
🔑 cat = 貓
🔑 paws = 前腳
🔑 slowly = 慢慢
🔑 five = 五個
貓咪登場的重點字!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The cat holds the dog's tail gently between her front paws.
questions.question: Which part of the cat's body grips the dog's tail?
questions.explanationZh: 「front paws」就是前爪——「forepaws」是同義詞,選 A!
questions.sentenceZh: 貓咪輕輕地用前爪夾住小狗的尾巴。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Five are all pulling together now, but the turnip only moves a tiny bit.
questions.question: How close are they to getting it out?
questions.explanationZh: 「moves a tiny bit」——動了一點點!就差那麼一步,說明「非常接近了」!
questions.sentenceZh: 五個一起拉,蘿蔔動了一點點。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The turnip moved a tiny bit but stopped again. It is still stuck.
questions.question: What does this small move mean for the family?
options: they are pulling the wrong way
the problem is now too big
questions.explanationZh: 動了一點點代表快要了!所以是「有希望,還差一個人」——多加一個就成功!
questions.sentenceZh: 蘿蔔動了一點點,但又停了。還是卡著。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The cat looks at her little friend by the wall.
questions.questionEn: Is there one more helper nearby who has not joined yet?
questions.explanationZh: 牆邊還有一個小朋友——就是小老鼠!還沒加入的幫手確實存在。答案是 Yes!
questions.sentenceZh: 貓咪看向牆邊的小朋友。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Five of them pull now. Everyone pulls as hard as they can.
questions.question: Who is the fifth helper to join?
questions.explanationZh: 爺爺、奶奶、孫女、狗——第五個是貓咪!「the cat」就是第五位!
questions.sentenceZh: 現在五個一起拉,每個都使出全力。

storyBeat: 叫小老鼠 — 終於拔出來!全家分享

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
本節新單字 (左中右英):
🔑 mouse = 老鼠
🔑 six = 六個
🔑 out = 出來
🔑 share = 分享
背熟這 4 個字,故事就會輕鬆聽懂。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The cat calls toward the small hole. "Little mouse, come help us!"
questions.explanationZh: 貓咪對著小洞叫:「小老鼠,快來幫我們!」

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: A little mouse runs out. She is the smallest of all.
questions.explanationZh: 一隻小小的老鼠跑出來了。她是所有人裡面最小的一個。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The mouse is tiny. But she does not say she is too small.
questions.questionEn: Does the mouse think size matters here?
questions.explanationZh: 小小的她,一句「我太小了」都沒說——她完全不把身材當回事嘛!答案是 No。
questions.sentenceZh: 老鼠很小。但她沒有說自己太小幫不上忙。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The little mouse holds on to the cat's tail with both paws.
questions.question: How does the mouse hold on?
options: holds the dog by an ear
questions.explanationZh: 抱住貓咪的尾巴——貓咪是毛毛的那隻,所以是抓住毛毛那隻的尾巴!
questions.sentenceZh: 小老鼠用兩隻小爪子抱住貓咪的尾巴。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Six of them pull now. The smallest one is at the end.
questions.explanationZh: 六個一起拉了!最小的老鼠排在最後面。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: How many are pulling at the end?
questions.question: How many?
questions.explanationZh: 爺爺加奶奶加孫女加狗加貓加老鼠——一起數,六個!
questions.sentenceZh: 最後有幾個在拉?

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: They count one more time. One, two, three, pull!
questions.explanationZh: 大家最後再數一次:一、二、三——拉!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Out comes the turnip! Everyone falls over backward in a happy pile.
questions.question: What happens this time?
questions.explanationZh: 這次蘿蔔出來了!大家開心到一起往後倒。
questions.sentenceZh: 蘿蔔出來了!大家開心地一起倒在地上。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The smallest mouse was the last help. That tiny push was the one.
questions.question: What does this story teach us?
optionsZh: 只有又大又壯的幫手有用
questions.explanationZh: 最小的老鼠是最後那一推——故事想告訴我們:再小的幫忙都重要,少了誰都不行!
questions.sentenceZh: 最小的老鼠是最後加入的那個。就差她那一點點力氣。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The whole family shares a big turnip dinner. Even the mouse gets a seat at the table...
questions.explanationZh: 全家一起吃大蘿蔔晚餐,連小老鼠都有一個位子坐……

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: A little mouse runs out. She is the smallest of all.
questions.question: How does the mouse compare to all the others?
questions.explanationZh: 「She is the smallest of all」——mouse 是所有幫手中最小的!
questions.sentenceZh: 一隻小老鼠跑出來了,牠是所有人中最小的。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The mouse is tiny. But she does not say she is too small.
questions.questionEn: Does the mouse let her small size stop her from helping?
questions.explanationZh: 她沒說「我太小了」——根本沒讓身材擋住她。答案是 No,小老鼠好勇敢!
questions.sentenceZh: 老鼠很小,但她沒說自己太小幫不上忙。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match the words from this lesson.
questions.explanationZh:
🔑 mouse = 老鼠
🔑 paws = 爪子
🔑 out = 出來
🔑 share = 分享
結局篇的關鍵字!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Six of them pull now. The smallest one is at the end.
questions.question: Where does the mouse stand?
questions.explanationZh: 「smallest at the end」——最小的在最後面!老鼠排在隊伍末尾。
questions.sentenceZh: 六個一起拉,最小的那個在最後面。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Out comes the turnip! Everyone falls over in a happy pile.
questions.question: How does everyone feel at the end?
questions.explanationZh: 「everyone falls over in a happy pile」——大家開心地倒成一堆!答案是「開心愉快」!
questions.sentenceZh: 蘿蔔出來了!大家開心地一起往後倒。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The smallest mouse was the last help. That tiny push was the one.
questions.question: What made the difference in the end?
questions.explanationZh: 「that tiny push was the one」——就是那最小的一拉改變了一切!答案是「小老鼠那一拉」。
questions.sentenceZh: 最小的老鼠是最後那個。就差她那一點點力氣。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The whole family shares a big turnip dinner. Even the mouse gets a seat.
questions.questionEn: Is the mouse included in the celebration dinner?
questions.explanationZh: 「even the mouse gets a seat」——連小老鼠都有位子!答案是 Yes,大家一起慶祝!
questions.sentenceZh: 全家一起吃大蘿蔔晚餐,連小老鼠都有一個位子坐。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The smallest mouse was the last help. That tiny push was the one.
questions.question: What is the big lesson at the end of this story?
options: mice are smarter than all others
big animals do all the real work
turnips are hard to pull alone
small helpers matter just as much
optionsZh: 大動物做所有真正的工作
questions.explanationZh: 最小的老鼠解決了問題——故事的核心是:「小幫手一樣重要」,少了誰都不行!
questions.sentenceZh: 最小的老鼠是最後的那個。就是她那一小點力氣做到了。
